violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Servsafe certificate has expired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

-Certified FMC16799 has expired as of 5/21/25 license must be renewed. -The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Observed the hand-washing sink in the kitchen blocked/covered by various items. Staff relocated items to designated area. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. PIC moved can opener to 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Several foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation located in lowboy and back refrigerators. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. "READY-TOEAT, TIME/TEMPERATURE CONTROL FOR SAFETY FOOD prepared and held in a FOOD ESTABLISHMENT for more than 24 hours shall be clearly marked to indicate the date or day by which the FOOD shall be consumed on the PREMISES, sold, or discarded when held at a temperature of 5ºC (41ºF) or less for a maximum of 7 days. The day of preparation shall be counted as Day 1." New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Observed the door to the outside, located in the (back of establishment), not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026
Observed leak from faucet connection of 3-bay sink located in the (back) area. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (mixer and inside chest freezers underneath and around lid) have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Observed the pre-flush spray hose at the (3-bay sink) hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026
Observed the door to the (employee) toilet room with self-closing device in poor repair/in need of adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026

The floors underneath equipment in the (kitchen and service) area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The floor tiles on the side of (ware washing) area is in poor repair (missing tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026

The ceiling in the (ware washing) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable and in poor repair: (several ceiling tiles observed with holes/cracking). Ceiling tiles shall be covered with smooth, durable, and easily cleanable material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. -Designated area for employees' beverages reviewed. -Staff moved beverages. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the back prep area next to 3-bay sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. -PIC supplied hand sink with soap during the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The hand-washing sink in the prep area was lacking paper towels at time of inspection. - Hand washing sink shall be supplied with paper towels. - PIC supplied hand sink with paper towel Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Per interview with PIC can opener is not in use, they use electric can opener. -Staff removed can opener from kitchen during this inspection. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized slicer during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back prep area of kitchen is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust, dirt, residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The door to the employee's toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The ceiling in the back prep area and front prep area are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
